hero.title: Run AI.
hero.desc: CatClaw is a cozy desktop home for local AI agents. No Docker, no complex configs—just download and start chatting with full privacy.

features.heading: Why Cat
features.sub: Everything a curious cat needs, built into one cozy app.

zeroSetup.title: Zero Setup
zeroSetup.desc: Bundled Node.js and OpenClaw runtime. Download, open, done — no Docker, no terminal gymnastics.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: All AI runs on your machine. Your conversations, your models, your data — never phoning home.

skills.title: Skill Ecosystem
skills.desc: Activate skills and agents like toys from a basket. A cozy, cat-friendly UI for serious AI work.

privacy.heading: Your Data Stays
privacy.desc: CatClaw keeps everything local. No middleman servers, no data harvesting — just you and your AI, curled up safely at home.
privacy.point1: All AI processing happens on your machine
privacy.point2: No telemetry, no tracking, no cloud calls
privacy.point3: Open source — inspect every line yourself

opensource.heading: Built in the
opensource.desc: CatClaw is proudly open source. Peek at the code, contribute features, or fork your own cozy corner.
